mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address ( member_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, zipcode, address, address_detail, is_default, default_yn ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{zipcode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{isDefault}, #{defaultYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, zipcode, address, address_detail AS addressDetail, is_default AS isDefault, default_yn AS defaultYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM address WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, zipcode, address, address_detail AS addressDetail, is_default AS isDefault, default_yn AS defaultYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM address WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_default = 'Y' LIMIT 1

SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, zipcode, address, address_detail AS addressDetail, is_default AS isDefault, default_yn AS defaultYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM address WHERE id = #{id} AND member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, zipcode = #{zipcode}, address = #{address}, address_detail = #{addressDetail}, is_default = #{isDefault}, default_yn = #{defaultYn} WHERE id = #{id} AND member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE address SET is_default = 'N', default_yn = 'N' WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE address SET is_default = 'Y', default_yn = 'Y' WHERE id = #{id}
